fourPiece: Every shot landed grants a stack of +0.5% weapon damage. Max 100 stacks. Missing removes 2 stacks. Stacks decay at 1/s out of combat.
Enemies cycle through red, white, and blue debuffs. Red: 8% damage taken. White: repairs your armor on hit. Blue: distributes damage to nearby enemies.
Killing a status-affected enemy transfers the status to nearby enemies within 10m and grants hollow-point ammo that applies bleed.
Using a skill resets the cooldown of your other skill. Cooldown: 20 seconds. Damaging an enemy with a skill reduces this cooldown by 3 seconds.
While your shield is deployed, gain 1% bonus armor per second. Max 20% bonus armor. Damage taken by shield contributes to bonus armor generation.
Applying a status effect to an enemy causes it to spread to enemies within 8 meters when that enemy dies. Status effects deal 50% increased damage.
Each body shot grants a stack of +1% bonus armor and +1% weapon damage. Max 50 stacks. Stacks decay by 2/s when not hitting body shots.
Destroying or manually detonating your skill returns it with full charges and +25% skill damage for 15 seconds.
Kills within 15m apply confusion to enemies within 5m for 5 seconds. Kills grant +20% weapon damage and 5% armor repair. Max 5 stacks.
Hitting an enemy creates a weakness zone behind them. Allies shooting through the zone deal +25% amplified damage for 5 seconds.
Critical hits mark enemies. Damaging a marked enemy distributes 60% of damage dealt to all other marked targets. Max 3 marks.
Signature weapon kills grant +40% weapon damage to the group for 20 seconds. Crossbow bolts generate on headshot kills.
Using an armor kit or receiving bonus armor grants +50% amplified damage and +50% bonus armor for 10 seconds.
Headshots flip a card from a deck. Full hand grants bonus damage to the group. Four of a Kind: +30% weapon damage for 10s. Dead Man's Hand: +60% weapon damage for 5s.
Repairing an ally at full armor grants them and you +25% total weapon and skill damage for 15 seconds. Healing allies below 50% armor grants the same bonus.
Skills that damage enemies apply a debuff that increases all damage taken by 10% for 8 seconds. Deploying a skill resets other skill cooldowns (20s CD).
